text:
Created attachment 255602
Patch 10.0.16 to 10.0.17

This is a patch release of www/glpi  from 10.0.16 to 10.0.17.

This is a security release (1 critical, 6 high severity, 5 moderate security fixes).

ChangeLog:
- https://github.com/glpi-project/glpi/releases/tag/10.0.17

Also attached the Poudriere testport logs.

Will open a separate PR with adds the VUXML entry.
